measurement_method: Measure across three undamaged diameters; record min/max/average
release_rule: Release OD from physical sample average unless landing face requires a corrected size.

measurement_method: Measure height at four perimeter points and across the centre register
release_rule: Energy 4144 thickness supports 24 mm target, but release from best undamaged old sample.

measurement_method: Measure inner bore and cup/register OD separately
release_rule: Do not release until sleeve/cup interface is known.

measurement_method: Measure raised/recessed register OD at two axes
release_rule: Must fit cup/seat without side load.

measurement_method: Measure across three undamaged diameters; record min/max/average
release_rule: Release OD from physical sample average unless landing face requires a corrected size.

measurement_method: Separate old pieces if possible; measure individual rubber elements and combined stack
release_rule: Do not approve one-piece 22 mm production unless the original sample proves the small mount is one piece.

measurement_method: Measure inner bore and cup/register OD separately
release_rule: Do not release until sleeve/cup interface is known.

measurement_method: Measure raised/recessed register OD at two axes
release_rule: Must fit cup/seat without side load.

measurement_method: If the old small mount separates into a seat and spacer, measure seat thickness at four points
release_rule: Use Energy 4146 only as a cross-check, not as a direct rubber release dimension.

measurement_method: Look for two short station rubbers in removed samples; measure if present
release_rule: Do not add to production count unless matched to a real vehicle position.

measurement_method: Measure bolt shank and old sleeve ID
release_rule: Sleeve ID must clear the final bolt without excessive slop.

measurement_method: Measure old sleeve OD and rubber bore/cup register
release_rule: Sleeve OD cannot be inferred safely from photos.

measurement_method: Assemble sample stack with cup/seat and measure intended compression
release_rule: Release sleeve length only after rubber/seat stack is final.

measurement_method: Measure old cup or seat washer OD at two axes
release_rule: Must fully support BM-SM without overhang.

measurement_method: Measure old cup or seat washer OD at two axes
release_rule: Must fully support BM-LG without overhang.

measurement_method: Measure old reusable cups away from rust-thinned edges
release_rule: Replace if thinned, cracked, or distorted.

measurement_method: Measure long axis after laying part flat without stretching
release_rule: Release only from physical sample because photo is off-plane.

measurement_method: Measure widest undamaged section
release_rule: Release only from physical sample because edges are damaged.

measurement_method: Measure at four points away from cracks and raised inserts
release_rule: Use maximum undamaged height as the free-height target.

measurement_method: Measure centre-to-centre using hole edges or insert bores
release_rule: Critical; do not release from photo alone.

measurement_method: Trace relief on card/acetate and measure corners
release_rule: Use physical trace for final cut.

measurement_method: Trace old rubber/metal carrier on card/acetate
release_rule: Photo dimension is quote-only.

measurement_method: Trace side edges and measure at three stations
release_rule: Photo dimension is quote-only.

measurement_method: Measure at multiple points away from torn/curling areas
release_rule: Use physical sample or carrier.

measurement_method: Measure raised/load pad above base
release_rule: Use physical sample or carrier.

measurement_method: Place left/right samples on vehicle or carrier
release_rule: Do not assume symmetry if old carrier proves handed.
